name: zprof

releases.name: v2.0.0
releases.body:
refactor and rework with atomic support, reducing overhead
added tests
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ANDRVV/zprof/compare/v1.3.0...v2.0.0

releases.name: v1.3.0
releases.body:
Fixed bugs related to thread-safe mode.
Adapted to Zig version 0.15.x.
Prevented integer overflow when profiler stats are updated.
Changed default logging from stderr to new custom std.Io.Writer.
Finally, refactored and improved comments.

releases.name: v1.2.1
releases.body: Improved tests, fixed hasLeaks function and improved syntax.

releases.name: v1.2.0
releases.body: Added compatibility with thread safe mode, using mutex.

releases.name: v1.1.0
releases.body: Improved code, made regression of unused logs and improves general performance.

releases.name: v1.0.0
releases.body:
Added `deinit()` method to free the Zprof struct.
Ready to stable version.

releases.name: v0.2.6
releases.body: Patch: bug on resize and remap, allocation appears always positive.

releases.name: v0.2.5
releases.body: Fixed critical bug: negative resize or remap causes integer overflow.

releases.name: v0.2.4
releases.body: Fixed dagling pointer, format error and docs.

releases.name: v0.1.3
releases.body: Fixed docs and added check for module version.

releases.name: v0.1.2
releases.body: Update: add compatibility for external dependency.

releases.name: v0.1.1
releases.body: Patch v0.1.1: LazyPath instead of path on build.zig
